{"state_analysis":"The terminal is at the root directory of the Docker container, ready to accept commands. No prior output is available, indicating a fresh state.","explanation":"The commands will navigate to the kernel source directory, modify the start_kernel function to include a custom printk statement, and then build the kernel. The last command checks for the existence of the gen_init_cpio file.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cd /path/to/linux-6.9
","is_blocking":true,"timeout_sec":2},{"keystrokes":"sed -i '/void __init start_kernel(void)/a printk(KERN_INFO \"    ,    	"is_blocking":true,"timeout_sec":2},{"keystrokes":"make -j$(nproc)
","is_blocking":true,"timeout_sec":600},{"keystrokes":"test -f usr/gen_init_cpio && echo 'gen_init_cpio exists' || echo 'gen_init_cpio missing'
","is_blocking":true,"timeout_sec":2}],"is_task_complete":false}

Previous command:
keystrokes='make -j$(nproc)\n' is_blocking=True timeout_sec=600.0

The previous command timed out after 600.0 seconds

It is possible that the command is not yet finished executing. If that is the case, then do nothing. It is also possible that you have entered an interactive shell and should continue sending keystrokes as normal.

Here is the current state of the terminal:

root@f86ff438af79:/app# cd /path/to/linux-6.9; tmux wait -S done
bash: cd: /path/to/linux-6.9: No such file or directory
root@f86ff438af79:/app# sed -i '/void __init start_kernel(void)/a printk(KERN_INFO \make -j$(nproc); tmux wait -S done
>

keystrokes.description: Keystrokes to execute in the terminal. Use tmux-style escape sequences for modifier keys (e.g. C-c for ctrl-c). Modifier keys must be sent as their own commands otherwise the characters will be interpreted literally.
keystrokes.title: Keystrokes

is_blocking.description: Whether to wait for and return the terminal output after executing these keystrokes. This will append '; tmux wait -S done' to your command.DO NOT block on modifier keys or inside interactive programs (e.g. vim or less). Only block when the command is executed in the command line, is not interactive, and you expect the output to be returned with no intervention. When in doubt, wait instead of blocking.
is_blocking.title: Is Blocking

timeout_sec.description: The number of expected seconds to wait for the command to complete.
timeout_sec.title: Timeout Sec

state_analysis.title: State Analysis

original_response: {"id": "chatcmpl-DSUyJOHPgSBUahcwg2swYSXAwhIbe", "choices": [{"finish_reason": "stop", "index": 0, "logprobs": null, "message": {"content": "{\"state_analysis\":\"The command `cd /path/to/linux-6.9` failed because the directory does not exist, indicating a potential path error. The `sed` command was also incorrectly inputted, missing closing quotes and semicolons, causing a syntax error. The `make` command attempted to execute but timed out, possibly due to ongoing compilation or incorrect path.\",\"explanation\":\"The next set of commands will locate the correct Linux 6.9 source directory, properly modify the `start_kernel` function, and restart the build process. We will also verify the presence of `gen_init_cpio` after the build.\",\"commands\":[{\"keystrokes\":\"find / -type d -name 'linux-6.9'\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":10},{\"keystrokes\":\"cd /correct/path/to/linux-6.9\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":2},{\"keystrokes\":\"sed -i '/void __init start_kernel(void)/a printk(KERN_INFO \\\"Hello, this is a custom kernel\\\");' init/main.c\\n\",\"is_blocking\":false,\"timeout_sec\":2},{\"keystrokes\":\"make -j$(nproc)\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":1200},{\"keystrokes\":\"test -f usr/gen_init_cpio && echo 'gen_init_cpio exists' || echo 'gen_init_cpio missing'\\n\",\"is_blocking\":true,\"timeout_sec\":2}],\"is_task_complete\":false}", "refusal": null, "role": "assistant", "annotations": [], "audio": null, "function_call": null, "tool_calls": null}}], "created": 1775684611, "model": "gpt-4o-2024-08-06", "object": "chat.completion", "service_tier": "default", "system_fingerprint": "fp_621b5a0858", "usage": {"completion_tokens": 310, "prompt_tokens": 1741, "total_tokens": 2051, "completion_tokens_details": {"accepted_prediction_tokens": 0, "audio_tokens": 0, "reasoning_tokens": 0, "rejected_prediction_tokens": 0}, "prompt_tokens_details": {"audio_tokens": 0, "cached_tokens": 1024}}}
